ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apparel_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apparel category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Outerwear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the category is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the category is designed for (e.g., Adult, Child, Infant) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the category is designed for (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User identifier for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size identifier */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category identifier for the apparel type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to reference the user's measurement data */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the recommendation algorithm used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Score indicating the confidence level of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES apparel_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the user in cm */,
  "weight_kg" INTEGER /* Weight of the user in kg */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the user (e.g., Slim, Athletic, Curvy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size that the feedback pertains to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the apparel category */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Numeric rating for how well the size fits */,
  "fit_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the fit */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to reference the size recommendation the feedback pertains to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES size_recommendations ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES apparel_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size that has been updated */,
  "updated_bust_range" TEXT /* Updated bust measurement range */,
  "updated_waist_range" TEXT /* Updated waist measurement range */,
  "updated_hips_range" TEXT /* Updated hips measurement range */,
  "updated_hand_range" INTEGER /* Updated hand range measurement */,
  "updated_shoulder_range" TEXT /* Updated shoulder measurement range */,
  "updated_sleeve_length" TEXT /* Updated sleeve length measurement */,
  "updated_inseam_length" TEXT /* Updated inseam length measurement */,
  "updated_rise_height" TEXT /* Updated rise height measurement */,
  "updated_thigh_circumference" TEXT /* Updated thigh circumference measurement */,
  "updated_outseam_length" TEXT /* Updated outseam length measurement */,
  "updated_cuff_circumference" TEXT /* Updated cuff circumference measurement */,
  "updated_neck_circumference" TEXT /* Updated neck circumference measurement */,
  "updated_hem_circumference" TEXT /* Updated hem circumference measurement */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "reason_for_update" TEXT /* Brief description of why the size was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that made the update */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to update the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)
